title: One click to reconnect all my Outlook automations upon creating a new template

posts.author: shadow79 (Andre Cornette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

On all of our project templates we use the Outlook integration and standard Outlook automation receipe alot. Many of our users spend time in other systems and only come into Monday to complete specific tasks once they receive an email. Once a new template is created for a project or project request, I have to reconnect my outlook email for at least 12 automations per board. It would be super helpful if there was a way that I could click a button and it would reconnect all of my automations that are using Outlook.
